summary: Reduced roadmap qd report-check validation below the line cap by moving registry, edge, and node-note helpers into focused sourced modules while preserving existing validation behavior.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh is reduced below 350 lines by moving focused validation helpers into sourced files.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-check-modularize/line-count-check.log records roadmap.sh at 204 lines, with registry, edge, and node-note helpers moved into focused sourced files under scripts/qd-report-check/.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No qd report-check shell file exceeds 350 lines after the split.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-check-modularize/line-count-check.log records all scripts/qd-report-check/*.sh files and scripts/qd-reports-check.sh below 350 lines.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: just qd-reports-check behavior remains unchanged for the current roadmap export and report set.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-check-modularize/qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing after the mechanical split.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing registry, node, edge, export envelope, and node-note schema validations remain covered by the checker.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The split preserves existing function names and jq predicates. Negative smoke logs under evidence/m4-qd-report-check-modularize show rejection of a non-array registry collection, unknown node milestone, invalid edge endpoint, and invalid node-note target.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and targeted malformed-roadmap smoke tests.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-check-modularize contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, git-diff-check.log, and the four negative-smoke logs.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Only Linux repository validation commands were run; realWorldValidation is marked not_required and no macOS validation is claimed.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, platform, capture, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, or macOS-specific behavior is claimed.
